creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
Here is a link to the latest result of my work:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/cgi/viewvc.cgi/ports/Mk/bsd.tcl.mk?view=markup

Download link:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/cgi/viewvc.cgi/ports/Mk/bsd.tcl.mk?revision=HEAD

Patch against bsd.tcl.mk from FreeBSD CVS (against my HEAD from SVN):
http://www.matuska.org/martin/cgi/viewvc.cgi/ports/Mk/bsd.tcl.mk?r1=45&r2=HEAD&view=patch

I will keep testing and looking for bugs and fix them in SVN.
Test reports and suggestions are welcome.
